/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/my_custom_interfaces/msg/_hardware_status_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/beeboss/Desktop/ros_workspaces/ros2_ws/build/my_custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libmy_custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
